requirementRef: Requirement: Mandatory-skills sentinel 解析 — Scenario: AGENTS.md 內含合法 sentinel 區塊
description: happy path parse — single block, two skills, clean names

input.text:
# Project

<!-- opencode:mandatory-skills -->
- plan-builder
- code-thinker
<!-- /opencode:mandatory-skills -->

rest of file

requirementRef: Requirement: Mandatory-skills sentinel 解析 — Scenario: 沒有 sentinel 區塊
description: file without sentinel — returns empty list, no throw

requirementRef: Requirement: Mandatory-skills sentinel 解析 — Scenario: 區塊內 bullet 有註解或空白
description: bullet normalization — trim whitespace, strip inline # comment, skip empty bullet

requirementRef: Requirement: Mandatory-skills sentinel 解析 — Scenario: 同一檔案內出現多組 sentinel 區塊
notes: plan-builder appears in both blocks; deduped; order = first occurrence.

requirementRef: Requirement: Global + Project AGENTS.md 合併去重 — Scenario: 兩份檔都存在且各有 skill
notes: Project order first, then project-only new, then global-only tail.

requirementRef: Requirement: Global + Project AGENTS.md 合併去重 — Scenario: global 缺失、只有 project
notes: No throw when global AGENTS.md does not exist.

requirementRef: Requirement: Coding subagent 獨立 preload path — Scenario: coding.txt 含 sentinel 區塊
description: coding subagent list sourced from coding.txt only
notes: Main-agent AGENTS.md path NOT consulted for coding subagent.

requirementRef: Requirement: Coding subagent 獨立 preload path — Scenario: 非 coding subagent 不吃 coding.txt 清單
description: non-coding subagent — no preload path activated
notes: resolveMandatoryList returns [] for non-coding subagents; coding.txt is NOT consulted.

requirementRef: Requirement: Skill 檔缺失 fallback — Scenario: 一個 skill 檔缺失
description: missing skill — warn + event + skip; others load normally
notes: Session does NOT crash; plan-builder still pinned; nonexistent-skill absent from registry.

requirementRef: Requirement: Skill content 以 pinned 狀態進入 system 陣列 — Scenario: 第一輪 session 的 preload
description: first-round preload registers + pins skill and content enters system[]
notes: skill-layer-seam wraps the content in the canonical tag.

requirementRef: Requirement: Skill content 以 pinned 狀態進入 system 陣列 — Scenario: 後續輪次避免重複載入
description: idempotent preload — round N > 1 does not rewrite content or reset loadedAt
notes: No disk I/O on subsequent rounds when content already cached + pinned.

requirementRef: Requirement: Pinned skill 不得被 idle-decay — Scenario: session 閒置 35 分鐘後
description: applyIdleDecay does not demote pinned entries past IDLE_UNLOAD_MS

requirementRef: Requirement: Pinned skill 不得被 idle-decay — Scenario: mandatory list 被移除後的 unpin
description: reconcile call drops skill from list — unpin + event
notes: Entry stays in registry; now subject to normal idle-decay.

requirementRef: Requirement: agent-workflow 退役與引用清理 — Scenario: 舊 session 殘留 agent-workflow 呼叫
description: skill tool handles not-found gracefully after retirement

toolResult.hint: has the skill been retired? See docs/events/event_*_agent-workflow_retirement.md

requirementRef: Requirement: Cache 相容性 — Scenario: AGENTS.md 修改後
description: cache invalidation on AGENTS.md mtime change
notes: mtime bump triggers cache miss; parser re-runs in round 2.
